Default implementations for time, error handling, I/O, memory, and port API functions in JerryScript.


## Files
- **[jerry-port-default-date.c](jerry-port-default-date.c.md)**: Default implementations for obtaining the time zone and current time using system time functions.
- **[jerry-port-default-fatal.c](jerry-port-default-fatal.c.md)**: Implements default fatal error handling for JerryScript with options to abort or exit.
- **[jerry-port-default-io.c](jerry-port-default-io.c.md)**: Implements default I/O functions for logging and console output in the JerryScript engine.
- **[jerry-port-default-mem.c](jerry-port-default-mem.c.md)**: Memory management functions for initializing, finalizing, and accessing a heap in JerryScript.
- **[jerry-port-default.h](jerry-port-default.h.md)**: Default JerryScript engine port API functions for setting and getting log levels and abort behavior.
